tasks.subject: Task 0.1: Catalogue Redis keys + constantes server.js
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Doc de reference listant cles Redis, channels, constantes utilisees par server.js. **Files:** Create apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/docs/redis-keys-catalog.md. **Verify:** doc couvre `grep -n "CRAWL_\|_CHANNEL\|_KEY" server.js`.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/docs/redis-keys-catalog.md"],"verifyCommand":"grep -nE \"^const [A-Z_]+\" apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/server.js","acceptanceCriteria":["Toutes constantes CRAWL_* listees","Type Redis precise par cle","Patterns d'acces traces","Channels pub/sub identifies"]}
```
